evals.name: promo-block
evals.prompt: Create a new Promo block for page-constructor — it's a hero-style promo section with a title, subtitle, background image, and a single CTA button. It must support light/dark theme. Make whatever is needed for the block to appear in Storybook under Blocks/Promo with two stories (Default and DarkTheme), including mock data with meaningful copy. Wire the block up everywhere required by the project's checklist so typecheck passes.
evals.expected_output: Full set of block files under src/blocks/Promo/ + registrations in blockMap, BlockType, exports, schema. Storybook stories in __stories__/ with two themes and a data.json shaped like a YAML config.

evals.name: feature-card-sub-block
evals.prompt: Add a FeatureCard sub-block — it's a card with a top icon, a title, and a description. Used inside CardLayoutBlock as one of its cards. Stylistically similar to BasicCard but with a required icon and a fixed size. Provide Storybook stories with several variants (Default, with link). Register the sub-block everywhere required so it works inside card-layout-block.
evals.expected_output: Files under src/sub-blocks/FeatureCard/ + registrations in subBlockMap, SubBlockType, exports, cardSchemas. Stories under Components/Cards/FeatureCard.

evals.name: tag-component
evals.prompt: Create a Tag component — a simple UI primitive that renders a single colored label with text, an optional left icon, and an optional color. It's a reusable utility with no registration in any maps. Provide a Storybook story showing different colors and states (with icon / without / different sizes).
evals.expected_output: Files under src/components/Tag/ (Tag.tsx, Tag.scss, __stories__). No registration in blockMap/subBlockMap. Story under Components/Tag.
